use_case: : The First Natural Language Agent Discovery Platform | AgentMarketCap
reported_delivery_components: Google Cloud just made it possible to shop for AI agents the same way you ask a question — in plain English. The new AI Agent Marketplace, integrated directly into Google Cloud Marketplace, lets enterprise teams discover, evaluate, and deploy third-party agents built on the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol using Gemini-powered natural language search. It is the first major cloud marketplace where the discovery layer itself is agentic.
